name: Aspen Group
analysis: APZ has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 21% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (3.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$5.0900, stop A$4.1481, target A$5.7900 (0.74:1) — then trail it.
